name: @linkrunner/web
description: Linkrunner web attribution SDK — track page views, custom events, and traffic sources with first-touch and last-touch attribution

scripts.build:core: terser src/core.js -o dist/lr.min.js --compress --mangle && cp src/core.js dist/lr.js
scripts.build:ts: tsup src/index.ts src/next.tsx --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --external next --external react
scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:core
scripts.dev: npm run build && cd test-app && npm run dev
scripts.dev:watch: npx concurrently "tsup src/index.ts src/next.tsx --format esm,cjs --dts --out-dir dist --external next --external react --watch" "cd test-app && npm run dev"
scripts.test:link: npm run build && npm link && cd test-app && npm link @linkrunner/web && npm run dev
